weather_report:
Subiaco wakes to a clean, open sky, the kind of blue that sharpens edges and throws honest shadows. The morning is already bright and will grow sunnier as the sun climbs; the UV will build to a moderate-to-high bite by midday despite the easy calm in the air. Visibility looks excellent, with a glassy clarity that makes colors pop and distant lines seem nearer. No hint of damp or change—just a steady, uncomplicated day.

Dress in light layers that forgive the shade but breathe in the sun; a hat, sunglasses, and a dab of sunscreen will serve you well. It’s a good window for simple errands on foot, a quiet lap of the neighborhood, or hanging a wash to dry in the soft breeze. If you’re desk-bound, open a window and let the light in; later, take a slow detour home to enjoy the long, bright afternoon.
